caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary related to Nigeria. The screen is divided into two sections: on the left, there is an image of people waving flags and holding signs, suggesting a political rally or demonstration. On the right, a political analyst named Olusola Oyekanmi, based in Lagos, is featured "on the phone," likely providing insights or analysis. The headline at the bottom reads "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu," indicating that the discussion might revolve around Bola Tinubu's political stance or campaign. The segment is part of a show called "Plus Politics" and can be watched on DStv channel 408 and StarTimes channel 308. The overall tone suggests a serious and informative discussion on current Nigerian political affairs.
